CREATE TABLE lambda_test (id Int32, value Float64);
SELECT id, (x -> x * x)(value) AS square FROM lambda_test;
CREATE TABLE users (user_id Int32, name String);
SELECT user_id, (x -> concat(x, ' is a user'))(name) AS user_description FROM users;
CREATE TABLE orders (order_id Int32, user_id Int32, amount Float64);
SELECT u.user_id, (x -> sum(x) / count(x))(o.amount) AS avg_amount FROM users u JOIN orders o ON u.user_id = o.user_id GROUP BY u.user_id;
CREATE TABLE nested_test (id Int32, array_values Array(Float64));
SELECT id, (x -> arraySum(x))(array_values) AS total FROM nested_test;
CREATE TABLE complex_test (col1 Int32, col2 String);
SELECT ct.col1, (x -> (x -> upper(x))(ct.col2))(col2) AS upper_name FROM complex_test ct;
